Ulcer Status of most problematic pressure ulcer. 01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing
NA = No observable ulcer/wound CHAR 2 x x
M0468_STASIS_ULCER (M0468) Stasis Ulcer Does patient have stasis ulcer? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0470_NBR_STAS_ULC (M0470) Number Stasis Ulcers Current number of observable stasis ulcers. 00 = Zero
01 = one
02 = Two
03 = Three
04 = Four or more CHAR 2 x x
